title: Smoky Saudi Arabian Lamb Skewers
description: A peppery and crispy Saudi Arabian dish featuring cherries, perfect for a hangover cure, made by broiling on a robata grill, and low in glycemic index.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together black pepper, coriander, cumin, paprika, and salt.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Brush the lamb skewers with olive oil and minced garlic.
Broil the lamb skewers on the robata grill for 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
In a small bowl, mix together dried cherries and lemon juice.
After the lamb skewers have cooked for 10 minutes, brush them with the cherry and lemon juice mixture.
Continue to broil the lamb skewers for an additional 5 minutes, or until they are cooked to desired doneness.
Remove the lamb skewers from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
